How to Buy

Create Wallet

Create a digital wallet with meta mask to store your crypto

Purchase ETH

Buy Ethereum from an exchange such as Coinbase and store it in your wallet

Swap $TIMI

Swap your ETH into $TIMI tokens. Now you're ready to take on Brians room

INFORMATION

Who is Timi?

The cutest iguana on base

SPECIES

IGUANA

Brian, the bald-headed mastermind steering the ship at Coinbase, has a not-so-secret childhood hero: an iguana! Although the iguana's name remains unknown, it doesn't diminish the significant role it played in young Brian's life. Brian affectionately introduces this inspiring reptile as "This Is My Iguana," or $TIMI for short.

This is Brians room, my molecule poster and my iguana
